reviews.review_description: When you get the game, it is free, but you can not play it.  You have to purchase it for $4.99 per month (after 7-day free trial) or pay $29.99 for the game for "unlimited bowling"  Even at FREE it is not worth the time or money.  The physics are off, there is no ball weight differance, no instant replay camera, NOTHING! There are only three bowling alleys, and the only real difference between them is the coloring of the area.  There are so many BETTER bowling games available that put this to shame.  Try "ForeVR Bowl" or "Premium Bowl" for a much better experience.  To think they want to charge $29.99 to buy this game is ridiculous.
I got the game thinking it was free then hopped on and i have to get one of two passes don't get unless you want to spend your money
It's really a good bowling game and gives realistic experience.
Simple but very relaxing and fun bowling. I recommend this game. It's also cheap so that's another plus.
I love bowling and this is a fun game! I really like the ball physics, I recommend.
I purchase game but I cant play...

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Sorry to hear you're having trouble playing the game. We’ve checked on our side and everything seems to be working fine.

Could you please share more detail about the issue you're facing at support@moonapps.io? Our team will look into it and get back to you as soon as possible to help resolve it.

Thanks for your support and for purchasing the game!

reviews.review_description:
Not an impressive title. It appears that minimum effort went into developing this game. 

No disrespect to the devs, but download and play PREMIUM BOWLING so you can see how ball & pin physics, and astethics  are supposed to work in a bowling game.

Make necessary updates to make this a quality bowling simulation and I will reinstall.

Update: I appreciate your response dev(s) and I wouldn’t even begin to know how to develop a game, but I still stand by my previous commentary. When the ball rolls into the pins, the physics are clearly way off. It’s as if the pins are heavier than the ball and the pins have no realistic movement…and the ball needs to rotate to create ‘hook’ or ‘curve’. I know I mentioned it before, but Premium Bowling has set the standard and this game is unfortunately not even close to being in the same league. I wish you well and I truly hope you are able to mold your game into a solid bowling simulation.
Awesome game!

reviews.review_title: A Decent & Free VR Bowling Experience
reviews.review_description:
This is a decent and enjoyable VR bowling game, offering a simple but fun experience. While it may not have all the bells and whistles of premium titles, it’s a great alternative—especially considering it’s free!

The gameplay feels smooth, and while a few features are still missing, the developer is actively working on improvements, which is always a great sign. If you’re looking for a no-cost way to enjoy bowling in VR, this is definitely worth a try! 🎳🔥
Worth it! A must-try free VR game with amazing physics and smooth interactions. Really enjoy the realistic feel—just needs multiplayer and more features!
This game does not have the safe circle and it's hard to play in a safe mode. Nearly broke my hand! Schitty game! NOT RECOMMENDED

developer_response.body:
Hi! Really sorry to hear about your experience.

Since your review, we’ve made improvements to the game to enhance safety guidance and overall gameplay. We’d love for you to try the latest version and see the updates. Your feedback truly helps us get better!

reviews.review_description: The game is just bad don’t waist your storage on this the physics of this game is bad and I don’t like the way that you spawn with you being tall and your body doesn’t even touch

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thanks for sharing your feedback. We’re sorry to hear you had a frustrating experience.

Since your review, we’ve made several updates to improve the game’s physics and avatar system to make it feel more natural and immersive.

We’d love for you to try the latest version and see how it feels now.

reviews.review_description: Love this game. It's a best bowling game i ever play,  I love the throw physics of ball. add more alley and balls themes
I can’t even walk with the ball anymore it super glitchy

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thanks for your feedback.
We’re sorry you experienced glitches while playing. We’ve already fixed the walking and ball handling issues in the latest updates to ensure smoother gameplay.

Please try updating to the latest version

reviews.review_description: This game is not fun

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thanks for your feedback.
We’re sorry to hear you didn’t enjoy the game. We’ve been working hard to add new features, improve gameplay, and make it more fun and engaging.

We’d love for you to check out the latest update and see what you think!

reviews.review_description: but once you get it, it’s a lot of fun. Just wish they would allow multiple players.

Can’t even aim the ball without it glitching out 
And can walk through objects 
You can also walk to the pins and knock them over while holding the ball ￼￼

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced. We’ve resolved the issue of walking through objects and on the alley in our latest update. The game has also been optimized for smoother performance.

If you’re still facing any issues, please feel free to reach out to us at support@moonapps.xyz with details about your device or gameplay settings.

We truly value your feedback and strive to improve with every update. Thank you for playing Bowling Alley!

reviews.review_description: Tbis game is not joinable i send invite to friend and it will not let me click on the button

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thanks for your message. Currently, we don’t support multiplayer mode. The game is designed for single-player only at the moment.

We appreciate your interest, and multiplayer is definitely something we’re planning for future updates!

reviews.review_description: Is this a middle school project or something?

developer_response.body:
Hey! Thanks for checking out the game. 😊
We totally understand your feedback. Since then, we’ve worked hard and made a lot of improvements to the game, graphics, gameplay, and overall polish.

We’d love for you to try the latest update and see the difference. Your feedback helps us keep leveling up!

reviews.review_description: What is this game hard to roll the and why no freaking boundary warning I banged my hand on my desk and it freaking broke  my finger don’t play this game 1 star it also is so glitched 0 stars

developer_response.body:
Hi, we’re really sorry to hear about your experience. We understand how frustrating that must have been.

Since then, we’ve fixed the glitches and improved boundary-related guidance to make gameplay smoother and safer.
Please make sure your VR guardian boundaries are set up properly for a safe experience.

We’d love for you to give the latest version a try!

reviews.review_description: Game won't load on my headset

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused.

We've recently rolled out updates to enhance the user experience and ensure compatibility with the latest devices, including the newly launched Meta Quest 3s. Please try updating your app to enjoy the improved gameplay.

If you encounter any further issues, feel free to reach out to support@moonapps.xyz for assistance.
